content:
It would be nice to get Roc syntax highlighting in Zulip. Looks like it uses Pygments under the hood. To do this we'll need to write a Lexer for Roc. We could use the Elm Lexer as a starting point.

Does anyone have experience with this? I can look into it further but uncertain when I will have the time. I just wanted to start the ball rolling and document my findings.
Would be nice to have for sure!
